name: Git Blame
description: Trace line-level authorship for a file, showing who last modified each line and when. Useful for understanding code ownership and change history.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path to blame (relative to repo root)

parameters.name: lineRange
parameters.description: Restrict blame to a line range

parameters.name: rev
parameters.description: Blame at a specific revision instead of HEAD

parameters.name: ignoreRevs
parameters.description: Commits to ignore (e.g. bulk formatting changes)

outputDescription: Per-line blame data: {line, sha, author, date, content} for each line in the range.
author: openspace
